title: Atoz 2112 Fun Basketball Stand
features: Suitable for age 3 years and upwards
Shoot the ball through the hoop and the ball returns to you in the net
Stand measures length 98 x width 50 x height 102cm when assembled
Self assembly by an adult, instructions included
description: Product Description Who can score the most hoops with the A to Z basketball stand? ideal for indoor and outdoor play, balls return to the player in the net. Stand measures length 98 x width 50 x height 102cm when assembled. 2 x 10cm balls and pump included. Easy self assembly by an adult, instructions included. This product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards. Safety Warning Aseembly by an adult required Box Contains 1 x Fun Basketball Stand See more
